corporations.name: Mons Insurance
corporations.description: Effect: When a player causes another player to decrease production or lose resources, pay 3MC to the victim, or as much as possible. You start with 48 MC. Increase your MC production 4 steps. ALL OPPONENTS DECREASE THEIR MC PRODUCTION 2 STEPS. THIS DOES NOT TRIGGER THE EFFECT BELOW

corporations.name: Philares
corporations.description: You start with 47 MC. As your first action, place a greenery tile and raise the oxygen 1 step

corporations.name: Arcadian Communities
corporations.description: You start with 40 MC and 10 steel. AS YOUR FIRST ACTION, PLACE A COMMUNITY (PLAYER MARKER ON A NON-RESERVED AREA.)

corporations.name: Recyclon
corporations.description: Effect: When you play a building tag, including this, gain 1 microbe to this card, or remove 2 microbes here and raise your plant production 1 step. You start with 38 MC and 1 steel production

corporations.name: Splice
corporations.description: You start with 44 MC. As your first action, reveal cards until you have revealed a microbe tag. Take that card into hand, and discard the rest

corporations.name: Astrodrill
corporations.description: You start with 35MC, and 3 asteroid resources here

corporations.name: Pharmacy Union
corporations.description: You start with 54MC. Draw a science card

corporations.name: Ecotec
corporations.description: You start with 42MC and 1 plant production

corporations.name: Tycho Magnetics
corporations.description: You start with 42MC. Increase your energy production 1 step

corporations.name: Kuiper Cooperative
corporations.description: Action: Add 1 asteroid here for every space tag you have. Effect: When paying for the ASTEROID or AQUIFER standard projects, each asteroid here maybe used as 1MC. You start with 33MC. Increase your titanium production 1 step

corporations.name: Spire
corporations.description: Effect: When you play a card with AT LEAST 2 tags, including this, add 1 science resource here. When you pay for standard project, science resources here maybe be used as 2MC each. You start with 50MC. As your first action draw 4 cards, then discard 3 cards from hand

corporations.name: Sagitta
corporations.description: Effect: When you play a card with no tags, including this, gain 4MC. When you play a card with EXACTLY 1 TAG, you gain 1MC. You start with 31MC. Increase your energy production 1 step and your MC production 2 steps. Draw a card that has no tags

corporations.name: Palladin Shipping
corporations.description: Effect: When you play a space event, gain 1 titanium. Action: Spend 2 titanium to raise temperature 1 step. You start with 36MC. Gain 5 titanium

corporations.name: Nirgal Enterprises
corporations.description: You start with 30MC. Increase your energy,plant, and steel production 1 step

preludes.name: Allied Banks
preludes.description: Increase your MC production 4 steps. Gain 3 MC .

preludes.name: Aquifer Turbines
preludes.description: Place an Ocean. Increase your energy production 2 steps. Pay 3 MC .

preludes.name: Biofuels
preludes.description: Increase your energy and plant production 1 step. Gain 2 plants.

preludes.name: Biolab
preludes.description: Increase your plant production 1 step. Draw 3 cards.

preludes.name: Biosphere Support
preludes.description: Increase your plant production 2 steps. Decrease your MC production 1 step.

preludes.name: Business Empire
preludes.description: Increase your MC production 6 steps. Pay 6 MC.

preludes.name: Dome Farming
preludes.description: Increase your MC production 2 steps and plant production 1 step.

preludes.name: Donation
preludes.description: Gain 21 MC.

preludes.name: Early Settlement
preludes.description: Increase your plant production 1 step. Place a city tile.

preludes.name: Ecology Experts
preludes.description: Increase your plant production 1 step. Play a card from hand, ignoring global requirements.

preludes.name: Eccentric Sponsor
preludes.description: Play 1 card from hand with a 25 MC reduction.

preludes.name: Experimental Forest
preludes.description: Place 1 Greenery tile. Reveal cards until you reveal two cards with plant tags on them. Take them into your hand and discard the rest.

preludes.name: Galilean Mining
preludes.description: Increase your titanium production 2 steps. Pay 5 MC.

preludes.name: Great Aquifer
preludes.description: Place 2 Ocean tiles.

preludes.name: Huge Asteroid
preludes.description: Increase Temperature 3 steps. Pay 5 MC.

preludes.name: Io Research Outpost
preludes.description: Increase your titanium production 1 step. Draw a card.

preludes.name: Loan
preludes.description: Gain 30 MC. Decrease your MC production 2 steps.

preludes.name: Martian Industries
preludes.description: Increase your energy and steel production 1 step. Gain 6 MC.

preludes.name: Metal-rich Asteroid
preludes.description: Increase temperature 1 step. Gain 4 titanium and 4 steel.

preludes.name: Metals Company
preludes.description: Increase your MC, steel and titanium production 1 step.

preludes.name: Mining Operations
preludes.description: Increase your steel production 2 steps. Gain 4 steel.

preludes.name: Mohole
preludes.description: Increase your heat production 3 steps. Gain 3 heat.

preludes.name: Mohole Excavation
preludes.description: Increase your steel production 1 step and heat production 2 steps. Gain 2 heat.

preludes.name: Nitrogen Shipment
preludes.description: Increase your plant production 1 step. Increase your TR 1 step. Gain 5 MC.

preludes.name: Orbital Construction Yard
preludes.description: Increase your titanium production 1 step. Gain 4 titanium.

preludes.name: Polar Industries
preludes.description: Increase your heat production 2 steps. Place an Ocean tile.

preludes.name: Power Generation
preludes.description: Increase your energy production 3 steps.

preludes.name: Research Network
preludes.description: Increase your money production 1 step. Draw 3 cards.

preludes.name: Self-Sufficient Settlement
preludes.description: Increase your money production 2 step. Place a City tile.

preludes.name: Smelting Plant
preludes.description: Raise oxygen 2 steps. Gain 5 steel.

preludes.name: Society Support
preludes.description: Increase your plant, energy and heat production 1 step. Decrease money production 1 step.

preludes.name: Supplier
preludes.description: Increase your energy production 2 steps. Gain 4 steel.

preludes.name: Supply Drop
preludes.description: Gain 3 titanium, 8 steel and 3 plants.

preludes.name: UNMI Contractor
preludes.description: Increase your TR 3 steps. Draw a card.

preludes.name: Acquired Space Agency
preludes.description: Gain 6 titanium. Reveal cards until you reveal two cards with Space Tags. Take them into your hand, discard the rest.

preludes.name: Merger
preludes.description: Draw 4 corporation cards. Play one of them and discard the other 3. Then pay 42 MC.

preludes.name: New partner
preludes.description: Raise your MC production 1 step. Immediately draw 2 prelude cards. Play 1 of them, and discard the other.

preludes.name: Head start
preludes.description: Gain 2 steel. Gain 2Mc per project card you have in hand. Immediately take two actions.
